name: Steven Bernstein
description: American trumpeter, slide trumpeter, arranger/composer and bandleader
abstract: Steven Bernstein (born October 8, 1961) is an American trumpeter, slide trumpeter, arranger/composer and bandleader based in New York City. He is best known for his work in The Lounge Lizards, Sex Mob, Spanish Fly and the Millennial Territory Orchestra.

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Varner
about_quotes.evidence: I would do something like with the great trumpet player Steven Bernstein and the trombone player Joe Fiedler. We did a brass trio.
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Varner interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, August 13, 2025

about_quotes.speaker: Hentoff Nat
about_quotes.evidence: Steven Bernstein and Sam Rivers – Sam Rivers is a man, maybe older than I am, who is always on the cutting edge of where jazz is going. What Bernstein did was to transcribe some of the recordings of the leading chazans... and made them into jazz and blues.
about_quotes.doc_title: Hentoff Nat — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Alvin Queen
about_quotes.evidence: And we did it in New York with Joe Temperley he played baritone saxophone, he was in there, and Steve Bernstein was in there, and I was playing.
about_quotes.doc_title: Alvin Queen interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, August 23, 1997 [interview 1 of 2]
